title: Centered Chat - Чат из Сезонов Лололошки!
description: Chats from Lololoshka seasons starting with Heart of the Universe and newer can now be added to your game!
body:
НЕСОВМЕСТИМ С CHAT HEADS!!!
**Chat from the seasons of Lololoshka**, starting with **“Heart of the Universe”** and all newer ones, can now be **added to your game!** The mod stylizes the chat interface, making it visually similar to the original, but does not copy it completely and preserves the vanilla logic.
